reviews.review_description:
If you enjoy a laugh with your multiplayer gaming, then Agent Oops is the game for you. I’ve only experienced the multiplayer side so far, but I can honestly say it’s great fun and will have you laughing out loud as you both try to guide Agent Oops through the levels.

Teamwork is essential—you’ll be disabling lasers, avoiding cameras, and dealing with all sorts of traps. At times, it feels like you need more than two hands to keep everything under control. The tutorial does a good job of covering the basics, and although I initially thought the game might be too easy, the difficulty ramps up quickly, even with two players working together.

There are also some great immersive moments, such as when security cameras enter your real play space. You’ll need to physically dodge them while still protecting Agent Oops on the game table. I’m hoping to see more of this dynamic in later levels.

The levels are challenging without being frustrating—striking a really nice balance.
I have experienced some issues with app sharing, which were only resolved by using a second copy of the game for my family member. I’m still unsure whether this is an issue with the game itself or something on my end. I’ve been in contact with the developers, who have been very responsive, please note this may be a problem my end.

Overall, if you enjoy having a laugh while gaming, this is a perfect title to pick up.
At first, the game felt a bit complicated, but after a few levels I got the hang of it. There are many levels, and some of them are especially fun in two-player mode.
I played with a friend and had a great time! The levels aren’t easy, but they offer just the right amount of challenge, and the worlds I tried are very different from one another.
Got this strictly to play in a room with friends.. main menu’s friend list is completely blank despite friends being IN GAME

developer_response.body:
Hi RoadkillKayla,
Sorry for the inconvenience, we're investigating the issue and we're working to solve it ASAP.
If you want to get in touch with us and share more details at support@memorable.games it can help us better understand the problem and fix it.

reviews.review_description: The game looks fun, but multiplayer never works.  I bought this game mainly for playing with friends.  Friend always show offline and invite do nothing!

developer_response.body:
Hi fayball,
Thanks for purchasing our game and sorry for the inconvenience! We're investigating your issue, since we don't have the same problems on our side. We hope to solve it soon and deploy an update.
In the meantime, make sure that every player has a copy of the game. Have you tried sending invites both in game and from the Horizon OS?
If you can reach us at support@memorable.games better describing your problems and what you're doing in game to trigger the issue, we can better investigate and solve the problem.
Many thanks,
The Memorable Games team
